# Experiment plan: <title>

- Experiment ID/version:
- Status: Draft / Registered / Running / Complete / Superseded
- Classification: Exploratory / Confirmatory / Software test
- Owners/reviewers:
- Registration timestamp/commit:

## Research question

State environment, mechanism, observable, control, uncertainty, scale, and
falsifying outcome.

## Background and evidence

Link model cards, parameter records, datasets, and the evidence ledger.

## Hypotheses

- Primary:
- Alternatives:
- Null:

## Models and implementation

- Source revision:
- Model IDs/versions:
- Configuration/schema:
- Scenario and geometry:
- Calibration status:

## Experimental design

- factors and parameter distributions;
- controls and ablations;
- ensemble size rationale;
- root seeds or preregistered derivation;
- resolution/precision/backends;
- simulated duration and stopping rule; and
- randomization/blinding where applicable.

## Primary outcomes

Definitions, units, observation windows, aggregation, uncertainty, and analysis
method.

## Secondary/exploratory outcomes

Keep separate from the primary test.

## Numerical quality gates

Conservation, convergence, solver, invalid-state, restart, and backend criteria.

## Scientific acceptance criteria

Thresholds and rationale fixed before inspecting confirmatory output.

## Exclusions and failures

Predeclare invalid-run conditions, missing data, partial output, and whether
reruns are allowed.

## Analysis

Transformations, statistical/model comparison, multiple-testing treatment,
sensitivity, null models, and software/version.

## Compute and storage

Expected memory, runtime, hardware, output size, checkpointing, durable location,
and NVIDIA requirement assessment.

## Results

Complete only after execution. Link immutable bundles; preserve negative and
failed runs.

## Deviations

Timestamp every deviation, reason, and whether it changes classification from
confirmatory to exploratory.

## Interpretation limits

List claims the design can and cannot support.
